# informed-skills
#
# A small, high-signal index for LLMs. Start here, then follow the linked files.
#
# Repo purpose
# - A catalog of installable "Agent Skills" (the product is the skill folders).
# - Downstream users install via: `npx skills add Thulr/informed-skills`
#
# Where to look first
# - `README.md` (human overview, install, layout)
# - `constitution.md` (repo charter: purpose + invariants)
# - `AGENTS.md` (agent instructions; symlinked from `CLAUDE.md` and `.github/copilot-instructions.md`)
# - `docs/reflection-log/` (per-failure entries; evidence base for changes to AGENTS/hard gates)
# - `docs/adr/` (architectural decisions: the "why")
# - `docs/runbooks/` (maintainer procedures: the "how")
#
# Key commands
# - `just check` (must pass before commit/PR; runs all skill static checks across lanes)
# - `npx skills add . --list` (lists installable skills from a local checkout)
#
# Repo layout
# - `skills/<name>/` published skills (release artifacts)
# - `skills/.experimental/<name>/` WIP skills (still installable)
# - `.agents/skills/<name>/` repo-local skills (authoring aids; not published)
# - `docs/` support docs and working notes
#
# If you need more detail, read `llms-full.txt`.
